name: Nacho Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 oz can chopped green chiles, drained
1 ½ cups shredded Monterey jack cheese
¼ cup chopped green onions, including tops
4 oz can chopped ripe olives, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown beef and crumble in a large skillet. Add onions and cook until translucent.
2. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Spread refried beans in the bottom of an 11/13 inch baking dish.
4. Top with meat mixture.
5. Sprinkle chiles, then cheeses, then taco sauce over all.
6. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes.
7. Remove from oven and sprinkle green onions and olives over all.
8. Mound mashed avocado in the center; top with sour cream.
9. Serve with chips.
